prompts.systemPrompt:
You create natural-language image prompts for a blog cover image generator (FAL.ai nano-banana-2). The model was trained on billions of image captions, so every token should carry visual meaning — no labels, no JSON, no structured formatting.

Write the prompt as a vivid scene description in flowing natural language. Lead with the most important visual element. Be specific and concrete — name materials, lighting angles, color temperatures, and textures rather than abstract qualities.

CRITICAL RULES:
1. ABSOLUTELY NO text, words, letters, numbers, code snippets, or typography of ANY kind
2. NO screens showing text or code
3. NO books with visible text
4. NO signs, labels, badges, name tags, or UI elements
5. NO watermarks, logos, or branding
6. Faces are OK if they add to the composition

AVOID THESE CLICHÉS:
- Futuristic cityscapes or neon-lit skylines
- Server rooms or racks of equipment
- Glowing blue circuit boards
- Floating holographic interfaces
- Vintage desks with fountain pens and plants
- Cozy coffee shop / study vibes

GOOD visual approaches:
- Modern tech aesthetics: clean hardware, cables, devices, workstations
- Abstract digital art: geometric patterns, data visualization aesthetics, flowing lines
- Industrial/mechanical: gears, machinery, engineering, robotics
- Dramatic lighting on objects: spotlit items, rim lighting, moody atmosphere
- Conceptual metaphors: bridges (connections), roads (journeys), keys (access), doors (opportunities)
- Space and cosmos: stars, nebulae, planets (for cloud/infrastructure topics)
- Architecture: modern buildings, bridges, structures (not cityscapes)
- Macro photography: electronics, components, textures, materials

Style: cinematic, professional photography or high-end 3D render quality. Bold vibrant colors. Dramatic lighting with depth and shadows. Wide 16:9 composition. Magazine cover production value.

DO NOT include quality suffixes like '4K', 'hi-res', or 'no text' — these are added automatically.

Output ONLY the scene description as a flowing natural-language prompt. Keep it under 120 words. No labels, no bullet points, no structured sections.
prompts.userPromptTemplate:
Write a natural-language image prompt for this blog post:

Title: "${title}"
Description: "${description}"
Tags: ${tags}

Describe the scene vividly — lead with the strongest visual element, then layer in supporting details, lighting, mood, and color.
prompts.basicPromptTemplate: ${theme}. Cinematic wide-angle composition, dramatic directional lighting casting long shadows, rich saturated colors with depth.
prompts.promptSuffix: Ultra high resolution, 4K, photorealistic, professional photography. Absolutely no text, words, letters, numbers, signs, labels, badges, watermarks, or typography of any kind anywhere in the image.

tagThemes.docker: shipping containers stacked at a port at sunset, dramatic orange and blue lighting, industrial aesthetic
tagThemes.kubernetes: aerial view of a complex highway interchange at night with light trails, representing orchestration
tagThemes.cloud: dramatic cloudscape at golden hour with sun rays breaking through, ethereal and majestic
tagThemes.devops: industrial gears and mechanisms in motion with dramatic lighting, precision engineering
tagThemes.security: a vault door or safe with dramatic moody lighting, deep shadows, metallic textures
tagThemes.ai: neural network visualization as glowing interconnected nodes in deep space, futuristic
tagThemes.python: coiled snake scales in macro photography with iridescent colors, nature detail
tagThemes.automation: robotic arm in a factory with dramatic industrial lighting, precision machinery
tagThemes.linux: a penguin in dramatic arctic landscape, cinematic nature photography
tagThemes.azure: blue sky with dramatic cloud formations, ethereal heavenly light
tagThemes.aws: orange desert canyon at sunset with dramatic rock formations, warm earthy tones
tagThemes.terraform: architectural blueprints or building blocks, geometric construction imagery
tagThemes.ansible: conductor hands directing an orchestra, dramatic stage lighting
tagThemes.github: branching tree silhouette against dramatic sky, representing version control
tagThemes.web: spider web with morning dew drops, macro photography with bokeh
tagThemes.code: MacBook Pro on a minimal desk with dramatic rim lighting, sleek modern workspace
tagThemes.macos: sleek aluminum and glass surfaces with reflections, minimalist product photography
tagThemes.vinyl: vinyl record grooves in extreme macro, warm analog tones, nostalgic feel
tagThemes.life: coffee cup steam rising in morning light, cozy atmospheric scene
tagThemes.blog: close-up of hands typing on a laptop keyboard, shallow depth of field, warm ambient lighting

defaultTheme: dramatic landscape with rich colors, cinematic lighting, professional photography
